details: Quote 'red crystals (ethanol), m.p. 211°C' confirmed in paper 102 (PMC6236359). Compound 14 IUPAC name is '3N-(4-methoxyaniline)-5-hydroxy-1,4-naphthoquinone' but the descriptive label 'p-anisidinyl-juglone adduct (compound 14)' correctly identifies the same compound via reagents (p-anisidine + juglone) and the explicit label. mp/value/source all correct.
Compound name AL6 with full IUPAC, mp 264.5 °C (dec.), and DOI 10.3390/antiox15020217 all match paper 001 exactly. Decomposition note appropriate.
Quote 'orange solid (73% yield) m.p. 177–179 °C (decomposition)' verified in paper 071. Decomposition property type, DOI 10.3390/molecules31040599 present.
5m, 6-(3-methoxy-4-nitrobenzyl)-6H-benzo[c]chromene, Mp: 84 °C confirmed in paper 013. DOI 10.3390/molecules31040706 present.
10k compound name and mp 156–158 °C confirmed in paper 124 (PMC11844072).
Methanol Bp exp 64.70 °C confirmed in Table 8 of paper 067 (PMC6146921). Experimental/compiled literature value — correctly tagged as measured.
Quote '1c (69%, m.p. 109-110°C)' confirmed in paper 097 (PMC6146420). Label '1c' bound to 109-110 range.
Compound 6e: 6-fluoro-5-(4-butylpiperazin-1-yl)-1H-benzo[d]imidazole; M.P. 140–142 °C confirmed in paper 068. DOI 10.3390/molecules31050844 present.
2m, 5-Acetyl-2-ethyl-4-(4-methoxyphenylamino)-6-phenylpyridazin-3(2H)-one, mp 161–162 °C (EtOH) confirmed in paper 011.
11b: 4-Methoxy-N-(2-oxo-2H-chromen-6-yl)benzenesulfonamide, mp 202–204 °C confirmed in paper 174 (PMC11203676). Source uses PMC ID, not DOI — folder match verifies real source.
2-pentanol Bp 119.0 confirmed in Table 5 of paper 062 (PMC3127127). Literature-compiled experimental — correctly measured.
Compound 7 = 3,7-Bis-(2-hydroxyphenyl)-4H-dicyclopenta[b,d]pyrrole-1,5-dione, mp 245°C confirmed in paper 098 (PMC6146883).
18b name (tacrine-coumarin hybrid via triazole linker) and mp 168–170 °C confirmed in paper 117. DOI 10.3390/molecules31040595 present.
Compound 12: 11-Hydroxy-10-imino-10H-benzo[i]quino[2,3,4-kl]acridine, m.p. 266 °C confirmed in paper 102.
Compound 39: N-(Adamantan-1-yl)-1-(4-bromophenyl)-1H-1,2,3-triazole-4-carboxamide, Mp > 270 °C confirmed in paper 010. Relation '>' correctly set.
2c: 5-Acetyl-4-(3-chlorophenylamino)-2-ethyl-6-phenylpyridazin-3(2H)-one, mp 186–187 °C confirmed in paper 011.
5o: 6-(5-methyl-2-nitrobenzyl)-6H-benzo[c]chromene, Mp: 187 °C confirmed in paper 013.
1a: M.p. 152.5–154.6 °C confirmed in paper 069 (PMC12984852). Phase-3 unicode whitespace mismatch noted in original notes — advisory only per v1.6.
FURL-G3: (Z)-N-furoyl-N-(2,4-dichlorobenzyl)-N-(4-bromophenyl)guanidine, mp 119.9–121.2 °C confirmed in paper 119 (PMC12943680).
Compound 9c: 2-Methyl-3-{4-[N'-(3-methyl-5-oxo-1-phenyl-1,5-dihydropyrazol-4-ylidene)hydrazino]phenyl}-3H-quinazolin-4-one, M.p. 302-304 °C confirmed in paper 053.
Compound 57: 2,6-Diamino-4-(2',4'-dichloro)-1,6-dihydropyrimidine 1-oxide, m.p. 160 °C confirmed in paper 020. DOI 10.3390/molecules29122942 present.
Compound 2a: 3-(2-furanyl)-6-(4-aminophenyl)-1,2,4-triazolo[3,4-b]-1,3,4-thiadiazole, M.p. 229-231°C confirmed in paper 090.
6g: N-[(3,5-dimetyl-4-nitro-1H-pyrazol-1-yl)-methyl]-2,6-dichloroaniline (typo 'dimetyl' is paper's own spelling), Yield 86%; mp 112–113 °C confirmed in paper 075.
Compound 20: (2E,4E)-N-(Adamantan-1-yl)-5-(3-phenoxyphenyl)penta-2,4-dienamide, Mp 174–178 °C confirmed in paper 010.
Compound 3: 1,6-Bis(2-furyl)-2,5-bis(2-hydroxy-3-formyl-5-methylbenzyl)-2,5-diazahexane, m.p. 109-110°C confirmed in paper 046.
